item.title: 27Ways to Make Decisions Without Complete Information
item.description: Rarely do entrepreneurs have all the details they need to fully evaluate the issue.

item.title: Green Card Holders Rush to Beat the Cutoff for SBA Loans
item.description: Citizenship requirements taking effect March 1 will block millions of would-be entrepreneurs from accessing affordable capital.

item.title: The Most Underrated Skill in a Lean Company
item.description: Knowing what not to build is often the difference between progress and drag in growing organizations.

item.title: Morgan Stanley Exec Warns of ‘SaaSpocalypse’ Hurting M&A
item.description: As AI anxieties hit corporate valuations, IPOs and acquisitions are on the line.

item.title: Why Middle Managers’ Struggle Costs Your Company
item.description: Prevent disengagement by choosing and developing leaders with intention.
